headline: Is Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Stock Fully Priced After A 106% Run?
summary: Keysight Technologies has delivered a 105.8% total return over the past five years, yet both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples currently point to the stock trading at a premium with limited valuation support. That tension has come into sharper focus as some institutional holders, such as Bell Global Equities Fund, have stepped back citing stretched pricing even as the business continues to sit at the heart of AI infrastructure testing and electronic...

headline: Can Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Justify Its Valuation After Its New AI Testing Product Launches?
summary: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) has rolled out two new products, the APS-ONE-400 network cybersecurity test platform and Eggplant Find by Description, drawing fresh attention to how its tools support complex networks and software testing. See our latest analysis for Keysight Technologies. Keysight Technologies’ recent AI focused product launches come after a strong run, with a year to date share price return of 55.95% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 95.44%. headline: Keysight (KEYS) And WIN Launch Automated GaN MMIC Workflow For 5G Hardware
summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) and WIN Semiconductors have launched a joint automated MMIC design workflow for GaN RF and 5G hardware. The workflow connects multi-domain simulation and verification in a single environment to support tapeout success for GaN MMIC chips. The collaboration targets applications in 5G infrastructure, Wi-Fi, satellites, and defense hardware. For investors watching the RF and 5G hardware supply chain, Keysight Technologies sits at a key intersection of test,...

headline: Does Keysight’s New AI Cybersecurity and Testing Suite Reshape The Bull Case For Keysight Technologies (KEYS)?
summary: In early July 2026, Keysight Technologies introduced two major innovations: the APS-ONE-400 modular network cybersecurity test platform for hyperscale, encrypted, and Elephant Flow traffic, and the Eggplant Find by Description AI tool that automates UI element identification without fragile screenshot matching. Together, these launches highlight Keysight’s push deeper into AI-driven software and high-performance cybersecurity testing, reinforcing its role in validating complex digital and...
